overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy in a white hat riding a horse through a scenic wilderness. The journey progresses from open grassy meadows with distant snow-capped mountains, through a forested canyon with a waterfall, and concludes with crossing a wide river.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland meadow with mountain vista

agents.ego_description: riding horse at steady canter along dirt path through tall grass, heading toward distant mountains

entered.detail: distant mountain range with snow-covered peaks visible through atmospheric haze
dense coniferous trees lining the horizon on both sides of the meadow
rolling hills covered in tall green grass and wildflowers
narrow winding path cutting through the grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide grassy meadow with a cowboy riding a horse along a dirt trail. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distant hazy background while pine forests line the horizon. The camera follows steadily from behind as the rider moves through the tall grass toward the tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested canyon descent with rocky walls

events.description: entering denser forest canopy as trail descends into valley
path narrows between tall rocky cliff faces on both sides

agents.ego_description: descending at moderate speed through forested canyon, navigating between trees and rock walls

entered.detail: tall gray rock face rising steeply beside the trail
massive stone wall closing in on the right side of the path
tall waterfall cascading down the mountain face at the end of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The rider descends into a forested canyon where the trail narrows between steep rocky cliffs. The open meadow gives way to dense pine trees and enclosed stone walls. A distant waterfall becomes visible at the canyon's end as the horse continues downward through the shaded path.

scene_state.functional_zone: valley floor with river and waterfall vista

events.description: canyon opens into wide valley revealing river and waterfall ahead
horse slows to walking pace approaching the river bank

agents.ego_description: emerging from canyon into valley, slowing as approaching the water's edge

entered.detail: wide body of water with blue-green surface reflecting the cliffs
lush green shore leading down to the water

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow canyon, the scene opens into a wide valley with a river flowing across the floor. The waterfall remains visible in the distance as the rider approaches the water's edge. The rocky walls recede to the background while the horse slows to a walk approaching the river bank.

scene_state.functional_zone: river crossing with sun glare on water

events.description: horse steps into the river, water splashing around legs
horse climbs out of water onto rocky shore on far bank

agents.ego_description: carefully guiding horse through deep water, swimming across the river toward the opposite bank

entered.detail: rippling water surface with splashes from horse's movement
rocky shoreline on the far side of the river
bright sunlight reflecting off the water surface creating lens flare

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the horse entering the river and swimming across. Sun glare reflects brightly off the water surface as the rider moves through the current. The horse splashes through the deep section before climbing onto the rocky shore on the far bank, completing the crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive mountain meadow through a narrow canyon and into a wide river valley. It begins with a cowboy riding a horse along a dirt trail through tall grass, with snow-capped mountains and pine forests framing the hazy distance. As the rider moves toward the tree line, the open landscape shifts into a forested canyon where the trail narrows between steep rocky cliffs and shaded pine trees, eventually revealing a distant waterfall. The scene then opens into a wide valley as the rocky walls recede, leading the horse toward the edge of a flowing river. Finally, the rider enters the water, swimming through bright sun glare and splashing currents before climbing onto the rocky shore of the far bank.
